messages.content:

Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

  "title": "手游玩家需求迭代：可轻度可重度的双重需求",

Section text:
## 手游玩家需求迭代：可轻度可重度的双重需求

message.content: This section can answer questions about the topic of mobile game player demand iteration, specifically addressing the claim that players now seek a dual experience combining light (casual) and heavy (core) gameplay. It identifies the primary entity as mobile game players and clarifies the definition/nature of this dual-demand trend. The provided excerpt does not contain specific dates, procedures, tables, figures, quantitative metrics, or evidence types.
